steps.technique: Use Alternate Authentication Material: Pass the Hash
steps.explanation: Adversaries may “pass the hash” using stolen password hashes to move laterally within an environment, bypassing normal system access controls.

steps.technique: Use Alternate Authentication Material: Pass the Hash
steps.explanation: Adversaries may “pass the hash” using stolen password hashes to move laterally within an environment, bypassing normal system access controls.

Adversaries may use brute force techniques to gain access to accounts when passwords are unknown or when password hashes are obtained.(Citation: TrendMicro Pawn Storm Dec 2020) Without knowledge of the password for an account or set of accounts, an adversary may systematically guess the password using a repetitive or iterative mechanism.(Citation: Dragos Crashoverride 2018) Brute forcing passwords can take place via interaction with a service that will check the validity of those credentials or offline against previously acquired credential data, such as password hashes.

Brute forcing credentials may take place at various points during a breach.

alerts.technique: Brute Force
alerts.explanation:
Adversaries may use brute force techniques to gain access to accounts when passwords are unknown or when password hashes are obtained.(Citation: TrendMicro Pawn Storm Dec 2020) Without knowledge of the password for an account or set of accounts, an adversary may systematically guess the password using a repetitive or iterative mechanism.(Citation: Dragos Crashoverride 2018) Brute forcing passwords can take place via interaction with a service that will check the validity of those credentials or offline against previously acquired credential data, such as password hashes.

Brute forcing credentials may take place at various points during a breach.

alerts.technique: Use Alternate Authentication Material: Pass the Hash
alerts.explanation: Adversaries may “pass the hash” using stolen password hashes to move laterally within an environment, bypassing normal system access controls.

alerts.technique: Brute Force
alerts.explanation:
Adversaries may use brute force techniques to gain access to accounts when passwords are unknown or when password hashes are obtained.(Citation: TrendMicro Pawn Storm Dec 2020) Without knowledge of the password for an account or set of accounts, an adversary may systematically guess the password using a repetitive or iterative mechanism.(Citation: Dragos Crashoverride 2018) Brute forcing passwords can take place via interaction with a service that will check the validity of those credentials or offline against previously acquired credential data, such as password hashes.

Brute forcing credentials may take place at various points during a breach.

Brute forcing credentials may take place at various points during a breach.

actions.action: Isolate the pivot host, block SMB/NTLM between segments
Isolate choke-point host C17693 (cuts blast radius of 93 hosts)
Open incident ticket INC-PS7-LANL-001 + notify SOC lead
